name: Valentine's Day Wood Base with Neon Tube Table Decor Heart - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of warmth to your Valentine's celebration with this Heart Table Decor from Spritz™. Made with a solid wood base, this vibrant red neon tube heart offers delightful charm to any holiday setting. Measuring up to 8 inches in height, it’s designed for indoor use and serves as a perfect decorative piece for adding a festive touch to your home this holiday season.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
